summary: Tested Report Separation feature - GENERAL report shows two separate sections (Araç İşlemleri and İşletme İşlemleri), BUSINESS report shows ONLY non-vehicle transactions, SOLD report shows sale transactions. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1), cosmetic only
React hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody>/<tr>/<td> - caused by dev tooling, cosmetic only

passed_tests: GENERAL REPORT - Two section headers verified: 'Araç İşlemleri' (data-testid=vehicle-transactions-header) and 'İşletme İşlemleri' (data-testid=business-transactions-header)
GENERAL REPORT - Vehicle section shows Araç Satışı ₺950,000 (Mercedes E200)
GENERAL REPORT - Business section shows Personel Maaşı ₺25,000 and Kira ₺15,000
BUSINESS REPORT - Shows ONLY business transactions: Personel Maaşı, Kira (NO vehicle transactions)
BUSINESS REPORT - Filter correctly uses car_id to separate (only shows transactions without car_id)
SOLD REPORT - Shows Araç Satışı transaction with 'Satış Elemanı' column
SOLD REPORT - Filter includes Araç Satışı category (Çalışan Payı and Araç Sahibine Ödeme also included in code but no test data)
critical_code_review_comments: Line 260-284 (ReportModal.jsx): displayTransactions filter correctly implemented - 'business' filter uses !t.car_id, 'sold' filter includes Araç Satışı + Çalışan Payı + Araç Sahibine Ödeme with car_id
Line 300-315 (ReportModal.jsx): Separate vehicleTransactions (has car_id) and businessTransactions (no car_id) arrays correctly computed
Line 635-706 (ReportModal.jsx): General report correctly renders two separate sections with headers 'Araç İşlemleri' and 'İşletme İşlemleri'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report separation feature verified: General report shows two sections (Araç İşlemleri with car_id, İşletme İşlemleri without car_id). Business report filters to only show transactions without car_id. Sold report includes Araç Satışı, Çalışan Payı, and Araç Sahibine Ödeme categories. Test data: 1 vehicle sale (Mercedes E200), 2 business expenses (Personel Maaşı, Kira). Date range 2025-01-01 to 2026-12-31 needed to see all transactions.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen

sold_report_filter.filter_logic: category includes Satış OR (has car_id AND category is Çalışan Payı or Araç Sahibine Ödeme)
